notes: Set HU/source state and HU_Navi_On_Off; repeat with 0x197 and 0x1E6.
Navi_Compass plus inactive/empty ETA/distance when no route.
Navigation/source state must be valid before TBT text.
TBT display type, direction, distance to turn, bar graph.
TBT text transport; may require reverse 0x4AB handshake.
Street/name transport; may require reverse 0x48C handshake.
FM station/name text transport; check reverse 0x4E9.
USB text/title transport; suppress only false fallback, not scheduler.
Android Auto transport on M-CAN; not C-CAN SPAS.
Disabled until trim support is confirmed; may trigger errors.
